Class SensorCache

java.lang.Object
edu.desu.cis.robot.service.SensorCache
public class SensorCache extends Object
A thread-safe cache for storing and providing access to the robot's sensor data. This class is updated by the TelemetryListener and read by the robot controller. It uses volatile fields for high-speed, thread-safe access to primitive sensor values.

  • Nested Class Summary

    static class 
    SensorCache.BallData
    A simple, immutable container for data about a detected ball.

  • Constructor Details

    • SensorCache

      public SensorCache()
      Constructs a new, empty SensorCache.

  • Method Details

    • updateFromTelemetry

      public void updateFromTelemetry(String json)
      Updates the cache with new sensor data from a telemetry JSON string. This method is designed to be called from a high-frequency telemetry thread.
      Parameters:
      json - The JSON string containing telemetry data.

    • clearHasDataFlag

      public void clearHasDataFlag()
      Clears the flag indicating that new data is available.

    • hasNewData

      public boolean hasNewData()
      Checks if new sensor data is available.
      Returns:
      true if new data has been received since the last check, false otherwise.

    • takeSnapshot

      public SensorSnapshot takeSnapshot()
      Provides a snapshot of the data.
      Returns:
      SensorSnapshot object with the current data.

    • getDistance

      public double getDistance()
      Gets the last known distance from the ultrasonic sensor.
      Returns:
      The distance in centimeters.

    • getLineOffset

      public double getLineOffset()
      Gets the last known offset from the line sensor.
      Returns:
      The line offset.

    • getLineStatus

      public int getLineStatus()
      Gets the last known status from the line sensor.
      Returns:
      The line status.

    • getBallColor

      public String getBallColor()
      Gets the color of the last detected ball.
      Returns:
      The ball's color as a string.

    • getBallX

      public int getBallX()
      Gets the x-coordinate of the last detected ball.
      Returns:
      The ball's x-coordinate.

    • getBallY

      public int getBallY()
      Gets the y-coordinate of the last detected ball.
      Returns:
      The ball's y-coordinate.

    • getBallArea

      public int getBallArea()
      Gets the area of the last detected ball.
      Returns:
      The ball's area.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the sensor cache's current state.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      A string containing key sensor values.
